function: Consolidate the week: recycle, no new grammar.
canDo: I can talk about my daily activities and what I like.

grammarPoint.title: Week 2 recap: accusative + routine + frequency
grammarPoint.explanation: No new grammar today. Recap: **things** stay the same in the accusative unless feminine (**газе́та → газе́ту**); **people** (masculine) take **-а/-я** (**брат → бра́та**). Time-of-day words (**у́тром, ве́чером**) and frequency words (**всегда́, ча́сто, никогда́ не...**) both go right before the verb. Run through it fast today — speed is the goal.

examples.en: I always read a newspaper in the morning.
In the evening I meet a friend.
Do you clean the house often?

example.en: I have breakfast in the morning.
In the morning I drink tea.

dialogues.title: A full day
dialogues.note: Every word here is from this week or last. Read once, then shadow it.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: What time do you get up?

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Я всегда встаю рано. Завтракаю, потом работаю.
lines.en: I always get up early. I have breakfast, then I work.

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Вечером я встречаю брата. Мы гуляем и говорим.
lines.en: In the evening I meet my brother. We walk and talk.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Do you often buy a newspaper?

lines.speaker: B
lines.ru: Нет, никогда. Я смотрю новости на телевизоре.
lines.en: No, never. I watch the news on television.

comprehension.q: What does speaker B do right after getting up?
Does speaker B buy a newspaper often?
Say what time you get up and what you do first.
Say you never buy a newspaper.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word from this week.
Translate into Russian — mix words from the whole week.

items.q: I always get up early and have breakfast.
items.answer: Я всегда встаю рано и завтракаю.

items.q: In the evening I meet my brother.

exercises.prompt: Put the words in the right order.

translate.en: In the evening I meet (my) brother.
I never eat meat, but I eat fish.
translate.answer: Я никогда не ем мясо, но ем рыбу.

translate.en: Do you often clean the house?
I rest, read, and listen to music.
translate.answer: Я отдыхаю, читаю и слушаю музыку.

buildSentences.instruction: Write 5 sentences describing a full day, mixing routine verbs, time words, and frequency words.

freeWrite.prompt: Write your fullest daily-routine description yet: morning to evening, with at least one frequency word (всегда/часто/иногда/никогда).
freeWrite.modelAnswer: Я всегда встаю рано и завтракаю. Днём я работаю, а иногда обедаю с другом. Вечером я встречаю брата, мы гуляем и говорим. Я редко смотрю телевизор, но люблю читать. Ночью я сплю.

tasks: Describe your whole day to someone, start to finish, in real time.
Use at least one frequency word (всегда/часто/иногда/никогда) in a real sentence today.
mission.verification: Did the description hold together, start to finish? Note yes / no.

srsCards.front: I always get up early and have breakfast.
srsCards.back: Я всегда встаю рано и завтракаю.

srsCards.front: In the evening I meet (my) brother.
